dataList.content: All of the Bongy Secuwity Agents have been dealt with, as Paus planned.
<... So I see.>
<... W-what?>
Big Teach! That's the face Capain makes when she wants praise!
<R-right! Excellent job, Faust! You did good!>
Yes. Paus is always excellent.
<And the rest of you too...>
Thank you, Big Teach!
I'm gonna tell my lil sister all about today's "Learning by Doing!"
Heh.
Ryōshū.
No acronyms.
... Thank... you... khh...!
... At least she listens to the Class Captain.
<And you too, Don Quixot—wait a minute... where is she?>
Jussis! Jussis!
... Still unable to keep her excitement in check, Don Quixote was sprinting in circles around the field.
Ah~ Don Quixote! You can't sit on the ground, it's dirty! Here, lemme put down a silk cloth first...
Oh, there's blood on your mouth...
... Don Quixote landed a sudden slap on Hong Lu's arm.
Uhm...
Do not touch my mouth.
... A feast of this kind... it has been far too long.
<... What the heck was that?>
<Could it be... that Don Quixote's just pretending to be a child...?>

dataList.title: Dietitian
dataList.content: Just leave them to it, Principal. That how kids grow—all running feet and playing out there.

dataList.title: Driver
dataList.content: The radio said don't bother people when they're eating.
<There you are, Miss Yuri, Miss Charon! Shouldn't you be at the cafeteria?>

dataList.title: Dietitian
dataList.content: I came out myself because the Early Elephants were taking too long!

dataList.title: Dietitian
dataList.content: Unfortunately, I didn't get a chance to taste the other two classes' cooking...

dataList.title: Dietitian
dataList.content: But I'll be happy enough to get a taste of yours at least.

dataList.title: Dietitian
dataList.content: All right, Faust. What do we have here?

dataList.title: Dietitian
dataList.content: Faust?
Nuthin'.

dataList.title: Dietitian
dataList.content: Pardon?
Paus only wanted the Extension-type Model III Baton dat Bongy Secuwity Agents keep wif dem.
Paus can make new toys by disassembling dem.
There are a lot now. It's a success.

dataList.title: Dietitian
dataList.content: What do you mean...?
Paus wonders:

Wif adequate nutwition, the human body can sustain life. Acts of sustenance, such as cooking, become inefficient when pefowmed by those who must consume food rather than by those who must pwoduce it. Why must we do dis "Learning by Doing" study session, then?

dataList.title: Dietitian
dataList.content: Uh... Haha... I'm sorry, Faust, you were speaking a bit too fast for me to follow. Can you repeat that? Maybe a bit clearer, this time?
Oh, sure.
Um... Paus is not intewested in cooking.

dataList.title: Driver
dataList.content: ... She said it.
<M-Miss Charon...?>

dataList.title: Driver
dataList.content: Charon never told kids to say these things. Not responsible.

dataList.title: Driver
dataList.content: Scooty-scoot.
Paus thinks... Energy-boost Jelly is the more efficient means.
Oh, no... the look on Miss Yuri's face... it's getting darker...!
<... W-what about the others? Ryōshū? Hong Lu?>
Meal times are better shotened, too. Pwincipal.
Um... I think I like the cooking back home better!
Jussis! Jussis!
<Drop it, Don Quixote. You've already exposed yourself.>
... Ahem.

dataList.title: Dietitian
dataList.content: ... Fine.

dataList.title: Dietitian
dataList.content: I wanted our students to be happy, to grow up healthy and strong. That's what this cooking activity was for.

dataList.title: Dietitian
dataList.content: I have an eye issue right now—I've been feeling really unwell lately. Still, I let myself work late nights, using what little time I had to make room for planning this activity, all the while managing not one, but two classes...

dataList.title: Dietitian
dataList.content: It was all... for the kids.

dataList.title: Dietitian
dataList.content: And this is what I get in return... in the end.
<M-Miss Yuri...!>

dataList.title: Dietitian
dataList.content: I didn't want to work overtime.
Miss Yuri's body... is turning.

dataList.title: Dietitian
dataList.content: None of us wanted to work overtime.
<Come now, Miss Yuri. Let's not make it sound as if something terrible's gonna happen...>

dataList.title: Dietitian
dataList.content: What was I supposed to do?! Is it so wrong that I chose this career path?

dataList.title: Dietitian
dataList.content: ... No, never mind.
If nobody here can learn not to waste food...
<Don Quixote.>
Jussis?
<... I said drop the act. Go get the kids sitting in the time-out chairs.>
... Very well.

dataList.title: Distortion
dataList.content: Then... then I'll just have to force-feed you!
<... Hurry up!>
